t_ch: 多数情况下，这只是一种自然现象。有些命途行者将之视作荣誉，但令使…必须拥有星神赐福的伟力。

t_en: I know what you're thinking. That theoretical Emanator of Remembrance remains a mystery, but now I'm leaning towards the idea that what the Garden's mirror reflected... was a kind of "miracle" that Fuli left behind.

t_en: Legend says that Fuli sits in meditation in the Anāsrava pure land, spreading the seeds of Remembrance across the universe. And when the cosmos ends, all the different realms will be reborn in THEIR garden.

t_ch: 如果这个封闭的世界也在祂的视线中，不难想象，浮黎需要一种机制，在「智识」看不见的角落将海量的记忆保存下来。
t_en: If this sealed-off world is also within THEIR gaze, then it's not too big of a stretch to surmise that THEY need a mechanism to save these incredible amounts of memories, and store them somewhere out of the Erudition's sight.

t_en: Now, I can say with certainty: "Time" is the page on which {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Fuli the Remembrance</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>that Aeon</color>{RUBY_E#} records Amphoreus. If it fades from existence and all that it records is lost among the stars, that Aeon will surely direct THEIR gaze here...

t_ch: 那会是一道跨越时空的瞥视，它将让今后的每一个我都能够化作你重置岁月的力量——将我的灵魂注入这柄仪式剑，创造一场{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>永不完成的「再创世」</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>永不终结的逐火之旅</color>{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: And it will be a glance that spans time and space, transforming each incarnation of me into the power you shall wield to reset time — imbuing my soul into this ceremonial blade, and creating an {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>unending Era Nova</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>endless Flame-Chase Journey</color>{RUBY_E#}.

t_en: The ceremonial blade "killed" Cyrene at the start of every recurrence. And at the end of every journey, Cyrene's "soul" took the extrapolated memories stored within the blade and buried them in this great tomb.

t_en: It's now a saga composed by you, me, and all the Flame-Chasers. It's our weak but endless prayer for "tomorrow."

t_ch: 总有一天，会有人翻开这近乎「永恒」的一页……
t_en: There will come a day when someone turns over this nearly "eternal" page...

t_ch: 唤醒所有尘封的「记忆」，让它们以更美的样子，被世界重新想起。
t_en: And awakens all the dust-covered "memories," so they can be recalled by the world in a more beautiful form.

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>错误进程：解析 █ ██</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Process error: Analyz███ ███</color>

t_ch: 就像花开花落，我讲述，你聆听。
t_en: I'll read, and you'll listen, like how flowers always bloom then wither.

t_ch: 我迎来自己的收梢，成为下一朵花绽放的养料。
t_en: I shall welcome my own decay, becoming nourishment for the next flower's bud.

t_ch: 而你会守候在这里，呵护这座「记忆」的苗圃。
t_en: And you shall continue to wait here, protecting this garden of "memories."

t_ch: 这样一来，等到「救世主」降临，最先映入眼帘的就是一片无垠的花海啦。
t_en: That way, when the "Deliverer" arrives, the first thing they'll see is an endless sea of flowers.

t_ch: 而我们的故事，会静静地躺在花丛中，一如「记忆」的每一道涟漪……
t_en: And our stories will be lying silently among the flowers like every ripple of "remembrance"...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>那名为《如我所书》的诗篇。</color>
t_en: And they shall become the epic known as As I've Written.

t_ch: 记忆的质料，被保存在数之不尽的支柱中……
t_en: The texture of memories is preserved in countless pillars...

t_ch: 跨越三千万世，为了将所有被遗忘的轮回保存下来，她倾尽了一切。
t_en: She gave everything to record all the forgotten recurrences across thirty million cycles.

t_ch: 这座大墓，就是「记忆」的种子…
t_en: This great tomb is the seed of Remembrance...

t_ch: 漫无止境的等待，将由我们打破。
t_en: We will put an end to this endless waiting.

t_ch: 带上所有的往昔，一同走向新世界吧。
t_en: Let's march into the new world with all the past.

t_ch: 好啦，别让气氛这么沉重嘛。
t_en: Alright, alright, let's not make things so gloomy.

t_ch: 最初的涟漪启程时，也曾像这样为同伴加油打气。这是一句饱含祝福的话语，所以，我也想送给你……
t_en: The very first ripple cheered up her friend like this before she set off. It's a sentence full of blessings, so I want to say it to you as well...

t_ch: 笑一笑，好吗？
t_en: C'mon, cheer up a bit, okay?

t_ch: 「迷失的人迷失了，相逢的人会再相逢。」
t_en: "Those who are lost remain lost, while those who have met will meet again."

t_ch: 多么感人的一幕呀。世界的最深处，正适合作为「开拓」重逢的地点。
t_en: What a touching scene. The deepest place in this world is exactly the ideal location for the Trailblaze to reunite.

t_ch: 要和我们重逢的人不是你，「长夜月」。
t_en: You're not the one we want to reunite with, "Evernight."

t_ch: 但现在，你必须给出一个解释：关于这座大墓，还有「第十三位泰坦」——
t_en: But you'd better explain everything to us: this tomb, and the "Thirteenth Titan"...

t_ch: ——说出你知道的一切。
t_en: ...Tell us everything you know.

t_ch: 你有点太紧张了，丹恒。对于你们，我向来坦诚。
t_en: You're too on edge, Dan Heng. I've always been honest with the two of you.

t_ch: 所以在谈论翁法罗斯的命运前，何不让我们先放下嫌隙……
t_en: Before we talk about Amphoreus's destiny, why don't we lay aside our differences...

t_ch: 一同为残酷的「真相」哀悼？
t_en: And take a moment together to mourn for the cruel "truth"?
"Truth"...?

t_ch: 看来，你们还没意识到呀。
t_en: So you still haven't figured it out.

t_ch: 再仔细看看吧，环顾四周。你们一定会好奇：最后的泰坦身在何方？
t_en: Take another moment to look around. Look closely. You must be curious as to where the final Titan is located, right?

t_ch: 真是个好问题。因为我也很好奇呢……
t_en: What a good question that is. I, too, am curious...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>除去冰冷的虚空，这里明明空无一物啊。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Because there is absolutely nothing here, except a cold, empty void!</color>

t_ch: 你的意思是，昔涟受到了欺骗。
t_en: You mean... Cyrene was deceived.

t_ch: 没错。浮黎在她心中种下虚假的希望，让她相信自己是特别的，而翁法罗斯仍有一线生机。
t_en: Indeed. Fuli planted a false hope in her heart, making her believe that she was special and that Amphoreus still had a chance.

t_ch: 于是，那可怜的女孩心甘情愿，一次又一次走进大墓，将自己奉献给「记忆」。
t_en: Then, that poor girl walked into the great tomb over and over again and willingly offered herself to the Remembrance.

t_ch: 祂何必这么做？
t_en: Why did THEY do that?

t_ch: 你以为祂会像昔涟祈祷的那样，拯救这个摇摇欲坠的世界？
t_en: Did you really think THEY would just save this crumbling world in the way Cyrene was praying for?

t_ch: 别天真了，忆者。在这场神明对弈的游戏中……
t_en: Don't be naive, Memokeeper. In this game between Gods...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」选择了「毁灭」。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The Remembrance chose to stand with the Destruction.</color>

t_ch: 以你对忆庭的敌意，我很难相信你的一面之词。
t_en: Given your evident hostility towards the Garden, I find it hard to take anything you say at face value.

t_ch: 难道窃忆者的行动还不够证明吗？他们竭力促成「铁墓」完成，绝不是为了虚无缥缈的记忆。让我告诉你真正的原因吧……
t_en: Aren't the Memosnatchers' activities enough evidence? They did everything they could to help Irontomb reach completion, and it wasn't just to obtain some fanciful memories. Let me tell you the real reason...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>铁墓是一艘完美的航船</color>，若能暗中埋下种子，在「智识」被它引爆的瞬间，「记忆」也将遍布寰宇的每个角落。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Irontomb is a perfect ark</color>. If a seed can be planted within, then the moment the Lord Ravager blows the Erudition to pieces, the Remembrance will be spread to every corner of the cosmos.

t_ch: 一条无主的命途，被两位星神平分。浮黎——将以此吞并「智识」。
t_en: That masterless Path will be equally split between two Aeons. Fuli... will devour the Erudition.

t_ch: 明白了么？列神之战早就开启了。
t_en: Do you understand now? The war among Aeons started long ago.

t_ch: 浮黎投来瞥视，不是要救翁法罗斯，而是要一丝不剩地榨干它，将它变作一页最凄美的悲剧诗。
t_en: Fuli did not glance this way to save Amphoreus. THEY will drain this world dry and turn it into a most poignant and tragic poem.

t_ch: 所幸，那女孩的牺牲不会白费。因为我会给她另一种可能。
t_en: But fortunately, that girl's sacrifices won't be wasted. I will give her another possibility.

t_ch: 我对{NICKNAME}承诺过，要重新编纂世界的因果，创造出一个无瑕的翁法罗斯。
t_en: I promised {NICKNAME} that I would re-create the cause and effect of this world, and form a flawless Amphoreus.

t_ch: 而对于这样一个无法回头的世界，「无瑕」唯一的定义……
t_en: But the only way for a world that can't be turned back to be considered "flawless"...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>就是被烈火烧尽后的空无。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Is to burn it with a raging fire until nothing remains.</color>

t_ch: 你打算…牺牲昔涟保存至今的「记忆」？
t_en: You plan to... destroy all the "memories" Cyrene has ever recorded?

t_ch: 没错，烧尽所有的故事、悲欢、徒劳…让忆庭的阴谋化作泡影。
t_en: That's right. I'll set fire to all the stories, all the emotions, all the futility... I'll turn the Garden's conspiracy to dust.

t_ch: 以如此巨量的质料为柴薪，足以彻底摧毁权杖的运行逻辑。铁墓将失去孵化的土壤，而翁法罗斯…也能真正迎来解脱。
t_en: Setting fire to this much material will be enough to completely annihilate the Scepter's operating logic. Irontomb will lose the soil upon which it grows, and Amphoreus... will be truly set free.

t_ch: 你口中的「解脱」，无异于「毁灭」。这个世界的一切将彻底从演算中消失，再也无处寻得。
t_en: The "freedom" you speak of is no different from Destruction. Everything this world ever was will disappear from the extrapolations, never to be regained.

t_ch: 而你自身的「记忆」，也一定无法幸免。
t_en: That would also include your "memories," by the way.

t_ch: 没错，鸟儿。所以我才需要你的协助。这一路同行，让我更加确信……
t_en: That's right. That's why I needed your help, little bird. The more we walked together, the more I was convinced...

t_ch: 你拥有一具美丽的法身，它与我十分相称。
t_en: ...That you have a beautiful dharmakāya. It fits me very much.

t_ch: 难怪，这才是你挟持我的理由……
t_en: So that's why you took me here...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>你的真身，是一道深不见底的执念。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Your true form... is a bottomless obsession.</color>

t_ch: 真聪明，你果然没有让我失望。
t_en: Smart girl. You haven't disappointed me.

t_ch: 这具化身不过是被烛火映出的倒影，舍弃也不足为惜。必须被留下来的，惟有「愿望」——
t_en: This avatar is but a shadow cast by the candlelight. Discarding it invokes no feelings within me. What I must preserve is only my "wish"...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>杀死「记忆」命途的愿望。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>My wish to kill the Path of Remembrance.</color>

t_ch: 如果不能将祂和祂狂热的党羽铲除，「三月七」将永远无法得到安宁。
t_en: "March 7th" will not find peace as long as THEY and THEIR fanatical henchmen exist.

t_ch: 前路漫漫，必须有一位守护者陪伴在她身旁。而你…无疑是最佳人选。
t_en: The road ahead is still long, and she needs a guardian to stand by her side. You... are my best choice.

t_ch: 恕我拒绝，这份职责似乎过于沉重了。
t_en: Allow me to refuse. That duty seems far too heavy.

t_ch: 反抗也是徒劳，我的小鸟。我会亲手把自己植入你的内心。等到安抚好{NICKNAME}和丹恒……
t_en: Resistance is pointless, my darling birdie. I will personally plant myself into your heart. And once I've calmed down {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng...

t_ch: 我就会去现实中，找到「真正的你」。
t_en: I will head into reality and find the "true you."

t_ch: 果然，骗不过你呢……
t_en: So... That wasn't enough to fool you.

t_ch: 一位天才的镜子戏法，和一道「智识」的保护机制，对么？
t_en: A genius's mirror trick and a protective mechanism of the Erudition. Is that right?

t_ch: 这层层保障，的确让人难以下手。
t_en: Those layers of security do make things a little difficult.

t_ch: 很可惜，那两位无名客已经来到了门外。你的计划…要出些小小的意外了。
t_en: But unfortunately, those two Nameless are already right outside the door. Your plan... is about to encounter a few mishaps.

t_ch: 后会有期，「长夜月」小姐。
t_en: Until we meet again, Miss "Evernight."

t_ch: 所以，伙伴们，还是不愿和我一起吗？挽救美丽的银河，甚至不留下一道伤疤。
t_en: Will you still not stand with me, my companions? We'll save the beautiful cosmos, and we won't leave even a single scar behind.

t_ch: 我们有信心战胜铁墓。
t_en: We are confident that we can defeat Irontomb.

t_ch: 也许可以，但那要付出多少代价？
t_en: Perhaps you can. But what will that cost?

t_ch: 翁法罗斯不应被舍弃。
t_en: Amphoreus should not be discarded.

t_ch: 你的做法，我绝不认同！
t_en: I'll never agree to your means!

t_ch: 谁是你伙伴，把三月七还回来！
t_en: I'm not your companion! Give March 7th back to us!

t_ch: 别被感性裹挟了，亲爱的{NICKNAME}。这个世界的英雄之旅，只是「记忆」美化过后的叙事。
t_en: Don't get caught up in your emotions, my dear {NICKNAME}. The Hero's Journey in this world is just a narrative embellished with "memories."

t_ch: 它的本质？终究是一串冰冷的数字。
t_en: Its essence is nothing but a string of zeros and ones.

t_ch: 为了你们，还有「三月七」——在我看来，这抉择十分合理。
t_en: For your own sake, and for the sake of "March 7th," I think my choice is a very reasonable one.

t_ch: 来吧，「负世」的火种就在我手中。只需安然睡去，银河便能得到拯救。
t_en: Come. I hold the Coreflame of Worldbearing. Just fall asleep, and we'll save the cosmos.

t_ch: 如果你真心认为我们有赞同的可能……
t_en: If you honestly thought we would agree with you...

t_ch: 那证明你一点也不了解三月七。
t_en: That just proves you don't understand March 7th at all.

t_ch: 像你那样与人相处，我果然做不到呢……
t_en: Seems like I really can't get along with people like you do...

t_ch: 但，为了让你还能拥抱明天，继续这段无忧无虑的旅程……
t_en: But in order to make sure you can still embrace tomorrow and continue this carefree journey...

t_ch: 总有些「记忆」——是不得不被焚烧的代价呀♭
t_en: Some "memories"... must be set on fire as the sacrifice ♭

t_ch: 继续「开拓」之旅
t_en: Continue the Trailblazing Expedition

t_ch: 三月七的房间
t_en: March 7th's Room

t_ch: 密钥归档
t_en: Encryption Key Archive

t_ch: 解锁「访问控制节点」
t_en: Unlock Access Control Node

t_ch: （先把这个扇区的符文收集完整后再继续前进吧……）
t_en: (I should collect all the runes in this sector before moving on...)

t_ch: （每一次轮回的牺牲都意味着沉重的决心…）
t_en: (Each sacrifice in every cycle represents a heavy resolve...)

t_ch: 你的视线仿佛温柔的风拂过那些轮回的记忆，不忍与哀悯紧紧揪住你的心。
t_en: Your gaze, like a gentle breeze, drifted across those memories of countless cycles, as reluctance and sorrow clutched tightly at your heart.

t_ch: 倘若她的离去是在循环之内，那么或许每一次的轮回，遐蝶都会照顾好这枚纯净的灵魂。
t_en: If her departure was part of the cycle, then perhaps in every reincarnation, Castorice would take care of this pristine soul.

t_ch: 但是她选择了超脱循环，「灵魂」不会去往西风尽头，而是沉入大墓，将希望延续下去。
t_en: But she chose to break free from the cycle. The 'soul' will not journey to where the west wind ends, but will descend into the Great Tomb, to carry on hope.

t_ch: 她在轮回中的无数死亡赋予了此地更为神圣的意义，既然你们已经来到了这里，定不会辜负她的决心。
t_en: Her countless deaths within the cycle have endowed this place with an even greater, more sacred meaning. Since you've already come here, you surely won't let her resolve be in vain.

t_ch: 那是……
t_en: Is that...

t_ch: 别离我太远，「识刻锚」会保护我们。

t_ch: 难以想象，这还是翁法罗斯么？
t_en: It's hard to believe... Is this still Amphoreus?

t_ch: 最后一枚密钥，带走它吧。
t_en: That's the last encryption key. Take it with you.

t_ch: 「我告别这美丽的世界，只为在你的回忆中，以我渴望的方式重逢。」
t_en: "I bid farewell to this beautiful world, so that we can reunite in your memories in the way I want."

t_ch: 「你会在往昔的涟漪里，看见我留下的足迹。」
t_en: "You will see the footprints I left behind in the ripples of past reverie."

t_ch: 「在这记忆之外，我不曾拥有其他命运。」
t_en: "I have never had any other fate beyond this memory."

t_ch: 「请用『爱』铭记我，就像所有逝去的诗篇里，唯一不变的尾注。」
t_en: "So, please remember me with 'love', like that eternal footnote in all the faded sagas."

t_ch: 「现在，翻开这本书吧——」
t_en: "Now, open this book."

t_ch: 「我会在过去等你。」
t_en: "I'll be waiting for you in the past."

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>操作已授权，协议名：【Ἠλύσιον】</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Operation authorized, protocol name "Ἠλύσιον"</color>

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>欢迎访问：德谬歌矩阵</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Welcome to the Demiurge Matrix</color>

t_ch: 刻律德菈，她如何改写「律法」，世人始终不得而知…但我相信，它一定是翁法罗斯对命运的决胜一着。
t_en: The world never learned how Cerydra rewrote the Law... But I believe it was Amphoreus's decisive move against destiny.

t_ch: 「岁月」的故事，你应该再熟悉不过啦。就把篇幅留给英雄们吧？
t_en: You must be very familiar with the story of Time now, so why don't we leave some pages for the heroes instead?

t_ch: 三千万次启程，三千万次分裂，然后，是三千万世逐火的起点。命运辜负了缇里西庇俄丝，但世人绝不辜负。
t_en: Thirty million departures. Thirty million shatterings. And the beginning of thirty million Flame-Chase Journeys. Fate betrayed Tribios, but she was never betrayed by humanity.

t_ch: 每一世，大地兽之王都会为反叛付出沉重的代价，但它的低吼中从未有过悔意。
t_en: The Dromas King paid a heavy price for their betrayal in every life, but there was never regret in their deep roars.

t_ch: 又一世，遐蝶为「死亡」献上了最后的拥抱。自此，便是另一段孤独的看护。如果有人能真正抱一抱她，该多好呀。
t_en: Once again, Castorice offered her final embrace to Death, and from then on, she started another lonesome watch. How wonderful would it be for someone to give her a real hug...

t_ch: 狡黠的猫儿，欺世的「诡计」…无论身份如何变换，她总会成为圣城坚守千年的支柱。
t_en: A devious cat, the Trickery that fooled the entire world... No matter how her identity changes, she will always end up being a pillar that stands tall for the holy city for a thousand years.

t_ch: 迈德漠斯的「纷争」之路，再次抵达了光荣而孤独的尽头…一如既往。
t_en: Mydeimos's road of Strife once again reached its glorious and lonely end... as always.

t_ch: 最后，温柔的彩虹遍布「天空」。无论往世、此世或来世，雅辛忒丝都会点亮人们心底里的微光。
t_en: In the end, the gentle rainbow covered the Sky. Whether in the past, present, or future, Hyacinthia will always illuminate the glimmering light in people's hearts.

t_ch: 再一次，阿那克萨戈拉斯用生命完成了证明。他的答案已经如此完备，只剩下最后一道来自天外的变量。
t_en: Anaxagoras once again completed the proof with his life. His answer was so complete... All he was missing was a last variable from beyond the sky.

t_ch: 「负世」…这柄神权是如此沉重，我不知道该如何述说才好。
t_en: Worldbearing... This divine authority is so heavy that I do not know how I can even tell its story.

t_ch: 在温热的黄金中，「浪漫」铸成了世人的长阶。如果她能亲眼见证黎明到来，该有多好呀。
t_en: Romance, in warm gold, forged the long staircase for humanity. How wonderful it would be if she could witness the dawn with her own eyes.

t_ch: 最后，鱼儿回到了「海洋」，她一无所有的家乡。在深海的尽头，她为后世坚守涡心，直到最后一刻。
t_en: In the end, the fish returned to the Ocean, her home where there was nothing left. For the sake of the future, she guarded the Vortex at the end of the deep sea until the very last moment.

t_ch: 这扇门后，就是那位「倾听者」的居所。
t_en: That "listener" lies behind this door.

t_ch: 看，房间尽头的符号……
t_en: Look. That symbol at the end of the room...

t_ch: 它属于第十三位泰坦，无人知晓的、孑然的神明……
t_en: It belongs to the Thirteenth Titan. The unknown solitary god...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>最初的智种，德谬歌。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The first Nouspore, Demiurge.</color>

t_ch: 「新的生命若要萌芽，它的种子须是死的。」
t_en: "If a new life is to be born, its seed has to be dead."

t_ch: 唯有舍弃，唯有「忘却」…灵魂才能在空无中走向新生。
t_en: Only through abandonment and "Oblivion"... can souls walk from emptiness towards rebirth.

t_ch: 在哀丽秘榭，我与昔涟相遇，并联系到了螺丝咕姆和黑塔。他们指出必须在新的世界循环中取得「负世」的火种，但来古士将成为我们的阻碍，要依靠「律法」的力量与之抗衡。
t_en: In Aedes Elysiae, I crossed paths with Cyrene and reconnected with Screwllum and Herta. They revealed that the Worldbearing Coreflame must be secured in the world's next cycle, but Lygus would stand in our way. Only with the power of the Law could we hope to oppose him.

t_ch: 我们回到了第一次逐火之旅的时代，与曾经的逐火英雄们相识，包括掌权的「律法」黄金裔刻律德菈，以及为她效命的「海洋」黄金裔海瑟音。
t_en: We returned to the era of the first Flame-Chase Journey, where we met the Flame-Chase heroes of old, including the monarch Cerydra, the Chrysos Heir of Law, and Hysilens, the Chrysos Heir of the Ocean, who served her.

t_ch: 要点亮「律法」，必须先战胜封锁涡心的法吉娜。但在战前的宴会中，我们却发现来古士已与掌权的刻律德菈达成合作。我在争执中被驱逐至世界之外，刻律德菈也因此与来古士决裂。
t_en: To ignite "Law," we needed to overcome Phagousa, who had sealed the Vortex. However, we discovered at the rallying feast before the battle that Lygus had already forged a pact with the reigning Cerydra. During our clash, I was cast out of this world, and Cerydra broke her alliance with Lygus.

t_ch: 在黑塔的提示下，我得到了流光忆庭的帮助，离开了来古士的囚笼。而在命途空间中，与三月七样貌相同的神秘来客「长夜月」带来了「负世」的火种，并将我送回了翁法罗斯。
t_en: Guided by Herta's hints, I obtained the Garden of Recollection's aid and left Lygus's cage. Within the Path Space, a mysterious guest bearing the likeness of March 7th — "Evernight" — appeared with the Worldbearing Coreflame and sent me back to Amphoreus.

t_ch: 在我离去的时间里，翁法罗斯的历史流逝千年。昔涟在荒废的奥赫玛城留下了过往的记忆：黄金裔与来古士进行了漫长的战争，付出了巨大的牺牲，为我铺就了再创世的道路。
t_en: While I was away, a thousand years had passed in Amphoreus. Amidst the desolation of Okhema, Cyrene left behind memories of a long war between the Chrysos Heirs and Lygus. Their sacrifices laid the groundwork for my return, and with it, the Era Nova.

t_ch: 在斯缇科西亚的幻象中，我得知了海瑟音的故事与第一次逐火之旅的过往。在海中守候的海瑟音带我来到了涡心，而来古士也就此现身，揭露了真身——天才俱乐部#1，赞达尔。
t_en: In the illusions of Styxia, the tales of Hysilens and the first Flame-Chase Journey were unveiled to me. Hysilens, who had been waiting in the ocean's depths, led me to the Vortex. There, Lygus emerged, revealing his true identity — Genius Society #1, Zandar.

t_ch: 我与海瑟音难以抗衡赞达尔的力量，但天才们与昔涟及时出手，依靠「记忆」的力量令他退场。我成功扭转了再创世，减缓了铁墓诞生的进程，但似乎也有另一股势力蠢蠢欲动……
t_en: Hysilens and I couldn't stand against Zandar alone. But the geniuses and Cyrene acted just in time, wielding the power of the Remembrance to drive him back. I successfully reversed the course of the Era Nova, delaying the birth of Irontomb. However, another force now seems to be stirring...

t_ch: ——该结束了。
t_en: It's time to end this.

t_ch: 把「三月七」还给我们，停止这场无意义的争端。
t_en: Return "March 7th" to us and end this pointless conflict.

t_ch: 你还要旁观到什么时候？
t_en: How long are you going to stand there and watch?

t_ch: 无名客从来都是自己上阵。
t_en: The Nameless always fight their own battles.

t_ch: 别想多了。我只是需要一点时间，来解决不必要的麻烦……
t_en: Don't get the wrong idea. I just need some time to deal with some unnecessary trouble...

t_ch: 天才们编写的密钥——现在已经失效了哦♭
t_en: The encryption key written by those geniuses is already invalid♭

t_ch: 先来玩个游戏吧，亲爱的{NICKNAME}？
t_en: How about we play a game, dear {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 放心，用不了多长时间。只是一道简单的选择题，A或者B。
t_en: Don't worry. It won't take long. It's a simple multi-choice question. A? Or B?

t_ch: 我能理解，将黄金裔们当作演算的数据，对你而言太过困难。那不妨先假设他们是活生生的人……
t_en: I understand it's too difficult for you to treat the Chrysos Heirs as extrapolated data. Then, why don't we assume for now that they're living, breathing humans...

t_ch: 现在，银河将要面临一场空前的浩劫，你的选择关乎无数星球的存亡。
t_en: Now, the cosmos will face an unprecedented catastrophe, and your choice will determine the fate of countless planets.

t_ch: 一边是与你同舟共济的伙伴：他们竭力抗争，争取到1%的胜算。但如果选择那1%，无论结果如何，都将伴随巨大的牺牲。
t_en: On the one side are companions who've weathered every storm with you. They fought with everything they've got and obtained a 1% chance of victory. However, should you choose that 1%, there'll be massive sacrifices no matter the outcome.

t_ch: 另一边，则是一个简单的按钮：<color=#dbc291ff>「忘却」会烧尽他们存在的痕迹，你对这段旅途全部的记忆。</color>但它能令酝酿中的灾祸骤停，让宇宙免于「毁灭」。
t_en: On the other side, there's a simple button: <color=#dbc291ff>The "Oblivion" will burn away all traces of their existence, as well as your entire memory of this trip.</color> But it will also halt the brewing catastrophe, and spare the universe from Destruction.

t_ch: 对于你要做出的决定，被牺牲的人们将完全知情，不掺杂任何隐瞒或欺骗……
t_en: Those who are to be sacrificed will be fully aware of the decision you need to make. There will be no concealment or deception...

t_ch: 告诉我，你会如何选择？
t_en: Tell me, what will you choose?

t_ch: 别想用电车难题糊弄我。
t_en: Don't try to trick me with that trolley problem.

t_ch: 过时的话题，没必要讨论！
t_en: Such an outdated theme. Not worth discussing!

t_ch: 凭什么只有1%？
t_en: What makes it only 1%?

t_ch: 你偷换的概念可不止一条。
t_en: You're twisting more than just one concept here.

t_ch: 你说得对。这个选择没有意义，也不重要。唯一有趣的……
t_en: You're right. This choice is meaningless and unimportant. The only interesting thing...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>是做出选择的人数。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Is the number of people making that choice.</color>

t_ch: 与此同时，我向丹恒提出了同样的问题。答案无关紧要，让我瞧瞧——「开拓」的精神，是否真如你们声称的那般一心同体。
t_en: I've just posed the same question to Dan Heng. The answer doesn't matter. Let me see... Is this Trailblaze spirit truly as unified as you all claim it to be?

t_ch: 现在，证明给我看吧？
t_en: Now, why don't you prove it to me?

t_ch: 等一下——！
t_en: Wait!

t_ch: 昔涟？
t_en: Cyrene?

t_ch: 激动人心的「英雄救美」…再度上演！
t_en: Another "damsel-in-distress rescue"... plays out again!

t_ch: 还觉得自己能做什么吗，粉色的小忆灵？
t_en: Still think you can do something, little pink memosprite?

t_ch: 除了还算伶俐的口齿，你有什么能和我抗衡的武器？
t_en: What weapons do you have to stand against me besides your somewhat witty words?

t_ch: 可别把人家看扁了呀？除了口才和魅力——
t_en: Don't underestimate me! Besides my charm and eloquence I can—

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「——激起往昔的涟漪！」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"—and stir up ripples of past reverie!"</color>

t_ch: 这是……
t_en: What...?

t_ch: 关键时刻，我们才不会滔滔不绝呢！
t_en: We don't have time for endless chatter at crucial moments like this!

t_ch: 大意是你的软肋，长夜月。
t_en: Carelessness is your greatest weakness, Evernight.

t_ch: 这些忆灵是？
t_en: What are these memosprites?

t_ch: 不讲武德，干得好啊！
t_en: No holds barred. Awesome move!

t_ch: 快，{NICKNAME}！拿上这个——
t_en: Quick, {NICKNAME}! Take this—

t_ch: 按下快门！人家——坚持不了太久！
t_en: Take the shot! I can't hold on much longer!

t_ch: 拍你吗？
t_en: Do I take a photo of you?

t_ch: 怎么可能！当然是…「长夜月」小姐！
t_en: Of course not! Take a photo... of Miss Evernight!

t_ch: 拍她吗？
t_en: Do I take a photo of her?

t_ch: 对、对好焦再拍！
t_en: M—Make sure you get the focus right!

t_ch: 没时间解释了——快！
t_en: No time to explain. Quick!

t_ch: 干得好，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Well done, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 接下来，就交给「我们」吧！
t_en: Now leave the rest to "us"!

t_ch: 这里是，用某人的「记忆」制成的光锥……？
t_en: This is... a Light Cone made from someone's "memories"...?

t_ch: 啊，还有谐乐盘绕其中。
t_en: Ah, and there's a harmony entwined within it.

t_ch: 看来，有人在我看不见的角落付出了许多努力呀……
t_en: Hmm... Looks like someone's been busy behind my back.

t_ch: 又见面了，天真的「我」。
t_en: We meet again, naive "me."

t_ch: 虽然知道你是诚心诚意在夸我……
t_en: I know you mean that as a compliment...

t_ch: 但「天真」这两个字，还是还给你吧？
t_en: But as for the word "naive"... I think I'll give you that one back.

t_ch: 欢迎来到哀丽秘榭，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}永夜之帷{RUBY_E#}包围的小村庄。现在，这道回忆也属于你……
t_en: Welcome to Aedes Elysiae, a small village shrouded by the {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Veil of Evernight{RUBY_E#}. Now, this memory will also belong to you...

t_ch: 以彼之道，还治彼身。我以故乡为灵感打造的「迷宫」，长夜月小姐，希望你喜欢。
t_en: Let's give you a taste of your own medicine. With my home as the inspiration, I've created this "maze"... Hope you like it, Miss Evernight.

t_ch: 悟性很高呢，小忆灵。但只凭你和「同谐」的小鸟——想困住我，多少有些勉强了呀？
t_en: Quite perceptive, little memosprite. But with just you and that Harmony's little birdie... thinking you could trap me? That's a bit of a stretch.

t_ch: 所以，和我说说吧，「你」又在其中发挥了什么作用？
t_en: So, tell me, what role did "you" play in all of this?

t_ch: 是啊，真没想到…另一个「我」居然强得这么不像话……
t_en: I really didn't think that... this other "me" would be THIS strong...

t_ch: 还好还好，至少在「头脑」方面，咱还算占了上风！本姑娘的绝妙计策，完全超出你的想象。
t_en: But at least when it comes to brains, I've still got the edge! My brilliant plan? Bet you never saw it coming!

t_ch: 喔…是那个时候？
t_en: Oh... you mean that time?

t_ch: 在你我易换身体的瞬间，你用稍纵即逝的最后一丝心识……
t_en: In that split second when we switched bodies... with your last flicker of consciousness...

t_ch: 将{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>空无的精魄</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>自己</color>{RUBY_E#}藏进了泰坦的帷幕啊。
t_en: You hid {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>empty spirit</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>yourself</color>{RUBY_E#} within the Titan's veil.

t_ch: 呀，怎么一下子就被猜出来了…真没悬念！
t_en: Huh? You got it already? No suspense at all?

t_ch: 但我的计划可一点也不脆弱！没人比我更懂{NICKNAME}和丹恒。既然约好了，他俩就不会食言——
t_en: But my plan was super thought-out! I know {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng better than anyone. A promise is a promise for them. They never go back on their word!

t_ch: 无论史书、日记，还是留影石机，都是「记忆」绝佳的触媒。
t_en: History books, diaries, and photostones are all perfect catalysts for "memories."

t_ch: 没错！当我听见{NICKNAME}按下快门的声音，就算精神只留下一点点残余……
t_en: That's right! So when I hear {NICKNAME} press the shutter... even if there's just a teeny bit of my consciousness left...

t_ch: 也会「咻」地一下，自己钻进相机里去！
t_en: I'd "whoosh" right into the camera!

t_ch: 可这样看来，巧合的成分…是不是还挺大的？
t_en: But if you put it like that... Aren't you leaving a lot to chance?

t_ch: 怎么会！既然说了要给我拍照，{NICKNAME}肯定会在翁法罗斯四处按下快门。我总有机会等到{F#她}{M#他}。
t_en: No way! {NICKNAME} will definitely be snapping away all over Amphoreus because {F#s}he promised me to take photos! I'm guaranteed to run into {M#him}{F#her} eventually.

t_ch: 你确实很了解{F#她}{M#他}呀。
t_en: True, you really know {M#him}{F#her} well.

t_ch: 「长夜月」小姐，以我现学现卖的本事，想困住你当然不现实。
t_en: Miss Evernight, let's be real, my amateur skills aren't enough to keep someone like you contained.

t_ch: 但如果「三月七」也在场，局面就不一样了……
t_en: But if "March 7th" were here, that would be a different story...

t_ch: 因为你无论如何都无法忽视她，对吧？
t_en: Because there's no way for you to ignore her, right?

t_ch: 可以，那让我拭目以待。绕了这么远的路，你接下来打算怎么做？
t_en: Fine. Lay it on me then. After going on such a long detour, what exactly do you want to do now?

t_ch: 首先，我要谢谢你保护了{NICKNAME}和丹恒。但后来，你做的事就太过火了……
t_en: First, I want to thank you for protecting {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng. But what you did later went way too far...

t_ch: 趁一切还来得及，我必须让你回心转意才行！
t_en: So, while there's still time, I've got to make you change your mind!

t_ch: 有一件事的确令我困惑……
t_en: There IS something that truly puzzles me...

t_ch: 在献出一切「记忆」，化作空无的精魄后，你是如何找回自我的？
t_en: How did you find yourself again after giving up all your "memories" and becoming an empty soul?

t_ch: 看来你也不是全知全能嘛？
t_en: Looks like you aren't so omnipotent or omniscient after all, huh?

t_ch: 答案很简单：这一路上，「我」一直沉睡在相机里，陪着{NICKNAME}走完了全程。
t_en: The answer is simple. "I" have been dozing inside the camera all along, and I accompanied {NICKNAME} during {M#his}{F#her} entire journey.

t_ch: 而这一世，在{F#她}{M#他}和昔涟讲述星际旅行的时候，那些与列车同行的回忆也钻入了我的脑海……
t_en: So when {F#s}he told Cyrene in this cycle about {M#his}{F#her} interstellar travels, those memories of journeying with the Express entered my mind as well...

t_ch: 虽然还远远称不上「完整的三月七」，但用来和你对峙…这些「记忆」足够了。
t_en: I may still be far from the "complete March 7th"... but these "memories" were more than enough to fight you.
...Hah.

t_ch: 所以，前因后果你都知道，对吗？
t_en: So, you know what led up to this and what followed, right?

t_ch: 那就说说看吧，你有信心说服我的理由。
t_en: Go ahead. Tell me. Let's hear why you're so confident you can sway me.

t_ch: 理由什么的，不是再简单不过了吗？
t_en: Why? Isn't the reason super obvious?

t_ch: 哪怕只是透过镜头，我也知道，发生在翁法罗斯的爱、恨、挣扎，跟活生生的人没有区别。
t_en: Even through a camera lens, I know that the love, hate, and struggles that happened in Amphoreus were the same as what real living people experience.

t_ch: 话题又绕回了原点呢，我已经让{NICKNAME}做过一次选择了。
t_en: Same old topic. I already got {NICKNAME} to make a choice.

t_ch: 天秤两端的配重，相差太过悬殊。在「毁灭」的威胁面前，追求两全其美…只会两害得兼。
t_en: The weights on each side of the scale are far too unequal. When Destruction looms, trying to preserve everything... only means sacrificing everything.

t_ch: 可是，在提出这个问题前……
t_en: Well, take a step back. Before we ask this question...

t_ch: 你有想过吗？我们…有什么资格替别人做出决定呢？
t_en: Have you ever really thought about it? What right do we really have... to make choices for others?

t_ch: 假如银河是一座更大的奥赫玛，里头住着一位「凯撒」，那她也许可以替所有人做主，称量天秤两端的重量。
t_en: If the cosmos were nothing more than a bigger Okhema, ruled by a so-called "Imperator"... maybe then she'd have the right to weigh both sides and decide for us all.

t_ch: 但别忘了，我们只是一群「无名客」——
t_en: But the truth is... We're just a bunch of Nameless.

t_ch: 就算被人口口声声「救世主」、「救世主」地叫着，我相信{NICKNAME}也没有忘记过……
t_en: Even with everyone calling {M#him}{F#her} "Deliverer," I believe that {NICKNAME} hasn't forgotten...

t_ch: 「开拓」的意义是「探索、了解、建立、连结」，是与无数世界同行，而不是高高在上的「拯救银河」。
t_en: That the meaning of Trailblaze is to "explore, understand, establish, and connect." It's not about standing above the cosmos as some kind of savior. It's about walking alongside every world within it.

t_ch: 所以，别想用什么「牺牲在所难免」来绑架我，列车组对这些毫无根据的指责是免疫的！
t_en: So don't try to guilt-trip me with stuff like "necessary sacrifices." The Express Crew is immune to these baseless accusations!

t_ch: 况且——我只是打个比方——只要黑塔女士愿意，她随时可以掏出虚数武器，把这台「权杖」炸个灰飞烟灭。
t_en: Besides — and this is just an example — if Madam Herta wanted to, she could have whipped out her Imaginary weapon any time and blasted this "Scepter" to bits.

t_ch: 用你的话说，跟一位绝灭大君可能造成的威胁相比，区区几个无名客的命又算得上什么呢？
t_en: Because, according to your logic, the lives of a few Nameless are nothing compared to a Lord Ravager's potential threat.

t_ch: 但她没有这么做，而你，也不会同意这件事，对吧？我早就发现了，你也有一项致命的弱点……
t_en: But that's not what she did. You wouldn't have liked it either, would you? I figured you out a long time ago... you've got a fatal flaw.

t_ch: 那就是<color=#dbc291ff>「我」</color>。
t_en: A weakness in the shape of <color=#dbc291ff>"me."</color>

t_ch: 明明拥有这么蛮不讲理的力量，却还是遵守了对我的承诺。我只能认为……
t_en: You've got such incredible powers, but you still kept your promise to me. That only means...

t_ch: 你所有行动的「原动力」，只是为了让「我」能继续旅行下去。
t_en: The "sole motivation" behind everything you do was just so "I" can keep travelling.
Hah...

t_ch: 你好像，确实没有那么天真呢。
t_en: You're... not as naive as you seem, are you?

t_ch: 既然如此，我可以向你证明。
t_en: In that case, I can prove it to you.

t_ch: 不是替别人——而是替「自己」给出回答。
t_en: I won't answer for someone else, but for "myself."

t_ch: 来——抱着它。
t_en: Here, hold this.

t_ch: 空无的精魄……
t_en: An empty spirit...

t_ch: 细究的话，现在它才算是我的本体。
t_en: If you want to seriously think about it, this thing actually counts as my body right now.

t_ch: 构成它的记忆，全部来自相机中的照片，也就是我一路以来的「开拓」。
t_en: Its memories are all drawn from the camera's photos, in other words, from my journey of Trailblazing.

t_ch: 我醒着的时候，你一直都在沉睡。泛泛而谈，在你听来多半没有实感……
t_en: While I was awake, you were always sleeping, so talking about this probably doesn't feel real to you...

t_ch: 所以现在，我带你重新回忆一遍吧？
t_en: So, why don't I walk you through these memories all over again?

t_ch: 精魄，变成了一本手账？
t_en: The spirit... turned into a journal?

t_ch: 没错，这就是「记忆」。
t_en: Yep. That's what "memories" are.

t_ch: 你不清楚它存在于哪里，也不知道留下的是哪些。但在最需要它的时候，那些改变过你心灵的力量……
t_en: You don't know where they are, and you don't know what you actually remember. But when you need them most, the forces that have once changed your soul...

t_ch: 一定会再度浮现。
t_en: Are guaranteed to appear again.

t_ch: 跃迁仙舟「罗浮」前夜 星穹列车
t_en: Astral Express, the night before warping to Xianzhou Luofu...

t_ch: …怎么样，{NICKNAME}？第一次「开拓」之旅，感觉如何？
t_en: So, {NICKNAME}? How was your first Trailblaze journey?

t_ch: 很有趣。
t_en: It was very fun.

t_ch: 以后还是得注意安全。
t_en: We should still be careful in the future.

t_ch: 哎呀，丹恒老师，咱们今晚是来给{NICKNAME}庆祝的，就别说这种扫兴话啦。
t_en: Oh come on, Dan Heng, we're here to celebrate for {NICKNAME} tonight. Don't be such a buzzkill!

t_ch: 别听他吓唬人。跟你讲，本姑娘也算半个「开拓」专家——跟着咱走，准没事～
t_en: Don't listen to him. Listen, I am practically a "Trailblaze" expert. Stick with me, and you'll be just fine~

t_ch: 你管这趟叫「没事」吗？
t_en: You call this trip "fine"?

t_ch: 那、那还不是因为网上只能搜到七百年前的攻略！
t_en: W—Well, that's because we could only find <unbreak>700</unbreak>-year-old guides online!

t_ch: 看来…你们去过很多地方了？
t_en: So... you've been to a lot of places before?

t_ch: 那是当然：热夜之都、凯尔萨斯星、泰科铵…掰掰手指，这该是我的第六站啦。
t_en: You bet! Capital of Passion, Kalsas, Taikiyan... If I count on my hand, it looks like this is my sixth stop.

t_ch: 纪念品都在房间里呢，不过没来得及收拾。回头整理好了，再给你好好炫耀吧。
t_en: All my souvenirs are in my room, but they're just... a bit of a mess right now. I'll tidy up later and give you the grand tour!

t_ch: 看——贝洛伯格的笔记本，我特地问布洛妮娅要的纪念品！
t_en: Look at this. A Belobogian notebook, a special souvenir I asked Bronya for!

t_ch: 她给咱们准备了好些礼物呢：地髓原矿、大守护者奖章…不过，我只要了这个小本本。
t_en: She prepared quite a few gifts for us! Raw Geomarrow, Supreme Guardian medals... but I only asked for this little notebook.

t_ch: 它有什么特别的？
t_en: What's so special about it?

t_ch: 先前几次「开拓」，去的尽是些高科技世界——别说纸书了，就连全息投影都算老古董。
t_en: The previous Trailblaze missions were all on super high-tech worlds. Forget about paper books. Even holographic projections were ancient relics there.

t_ch: 雅利洛就很不一样，看着大家用纸笔记录生活，我才明白为什么会有人还在坚持制作手账。
t_en: Jarilo is completely different. Watching people record their lives with pen and paper... I finally understood why some still cherish writing journals by hand.

t_ch: 就像「书法」。深藏于人心底的感动，只有靠这种看似吃力不讨好的方式才能唤醒。
t_en: It's just like "calligraphy." Those deep emotions buried in human hearts can only be awakened through such seemingly thankless actions.

t_ch: 丹恒老师…还真是心有猛虎，细嗅蔷薇！
t_en: Dan Heng... you truly embody both a fierce beast and a delicate rose!

t_ch: 但咱也这么想的。相机只能拍下瞬间的{RUBY_B#「记忆」}风景{RUBY_E#}，但要把那些切片连缀成人生，还是得靠{RUBY_B#「开拓」}自己的双手{RUBY_E#}才行……
t_en: Anyways, that's what I thought too. A camera can only capture fleeting {RUBY_B#Remembrance}moments{RUBY_E#}, but stitching those moments into a story? You've gotta use {RUBY_B#Trailblaze}your own hands{RUBY_E#}...

t_ch: 简单来说，光拍照不行，相片总要有个地方供人展示嘛~
t_en: In other words, just taking photos isn't enough. They need a place to be displayed!

t_ch: 有照片墙还不够吗？
t_en: Isn't the photo wall enough?

t_ch: 都说了不一样。而且，这个小本本是咱和{NICKNAME}第一次共同「开拓」的纪念品！意义可就更重大了，嘿嘿。
t_en: I told you it's different! Besides, this little notebook is a memento of our first Trailblaze together with {NICKNAME}! That makes it even more special.

t_ch: 这么说来，下一站就是传说中大名鼎鼎的「盛会之星」，匹诺康尼……
t_en: Anyways, the next stop is the legendary Planet of Festivities, Penacony...

t_ch: 到时候，我可要使劲拉着你们合影，把储存卡都塞满！
t_en: So when we get there, I'll make sure we take tons of pictures together, until the memory card's bursting!

t_ch: 我没意见。
t_en: Fine by me.

t_ch: 还有——以后要是哪一站，咱忙别的下不了车，这台照相机就交给你们了。
t_en: And one more thing. If I'm ever too busy to get off at a stop, this camera is gonna be in your hands.

t_ch: 我可不想错过任何一次「开拓」——你们得好好练习技术，争取拍得有我八成好，听到没？
t_en: I don't want to miss a single "Trailblaze." So you all need to practice your photography skills until you're at least <unbreak>80%</unbreak> as good as me, got it?

t_ch: 当时，我也只是半开玩笑。没想到才过两站，咱就真的缺席了……
t_en: Back then, I was only half-joking. I never thought I'd actually miss out... and after just two stops, too.

t_ch: 独自度过的那<unbreak>97</unbreak>天，可把我紧张得不行，以为这辈子都要交代在这儿了……
t_en: Those <unbreak>97</unbreak> days alone had me on edge. I honestly thought that was gonna be it for me...

t_ch: 还好，本姑娘胆大心细、足智多谋，才没落在{NICKNAME}和丹恒身后……
t_en: Thankfully, with my quick thinking and sharp planning, I managed to keep up with {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng.

t_ch: 以藏在相机里的形式？
t_en: By hiding in the camera?

t_ch: 那怎么啦？那也算是「开拓」！
t_en: So what? That's still "Trailblazing"!

t_ch: 「照相机才是我的本体」——这句玩笑话，这次不就成真了嘛？
t_en: "The camera is my true form" That might've been a joke, but it came true this time!

t_ch: 虽然是很不方便啦：遇见危险没法出手；有人说怪话没法吐槽；看见{NICKNAME}拍烂片，我甚至都没法控制快门……
t_en: Well, yeah, it was super inconvenient. I couldn't help them when they were in danger, couldn't complain when they talked total nonsense... and watching {NICKNAME} snap a terrible photo? I couldn't even control the shutter!

t_ch: 但无论如何，我还是和他们一路走到了现在——
t_en: But I stuck with them all the way, til where we are now...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#「探索」}和大家一起认识这个濒毁却美丽的世界，为逐火之旅夺得第一枚火种——{RUBY_E#}
t_en: Together with them, I {RUBY_B#Explore}got to know this beautiful yet dying world{RUBY_E#}. I claimed our first Coreflame on the Flame-Chase Journey.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#「了解」}和新的伙伴相遇，又与新的伙伴离别——{RUBY_E#}
t_en: I {RUBY_B#Understand}met new companions{RUBY_E#}, then bid them farewell.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#「建立」}继承大家的决心，将其带向他们为之牺牲了一切，却又无缘看见的未来——{RUBY_E#}
t_en: I {RUBY_B#Establish}inherited everyone's determination{RUBY_E#}, carrying it forward into the future they fought for, one they can never see.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#「连结」}直到和这个世界的命运融为一体，改写注定走向悲剧的结局，和所有人一起重返真正的星空——{RUBY_E#}
t_en: Until my destiny {RUBY_B#Connect}becomes one with this world's{RUBY_E#}, rewriting the predestined tragic ending and returning to the true starry skies together with everyone.

t_ch: 只有这样，我才能在这场名为「翁法罗斯」的英雄之旅中……
t_en: Only then can I pen the name "March 7th"...

t_ch: 在这场前所未有的伟大「开拓」中，也写下「三月七」的名字！
t_en: Into this Hero's Journey called "Amphoreus"... Into this unprecedented Trailblaze!

t_ch: 第 <unbreak>33550336</unbreak> 次永劫回归 光历<unbreak>4932</unbreak>年
t_en: <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak>th eternal recurrence, Light Calendar <unbreak>4932</unbreak>...

t_ch: 征讨艾格勒前 某日
t_en: Sometime before the campaign against Aquila...

t_ch: 看来，我们在翁法罗斯的「开拓」，也要临近尾声了。
t_en: Looks like our Trailblaze in Amphoreus is coming to an end.

t_ch: 趁还有时间，一起挑挑吧？给三月做手账的素材。
t_en: While we still have time, shall we pick out some materials for March's journal?

t_ch: 啊！这个必须得有——
t_en: Aha! No way we're skipping this one.

t_ch: 这…你什么时候拍的，储存卡不是满了么？
t_en: Huh... when did you take this? Wasn't the storage card full?

t_ch: 不是还有手机吗？怕了吧，好玩到不行的「豹豹碰碰大作战」幽灵头号种子选手——豹子头•丹恒？
t_en: I still had my phone! Scared now, Dan Heng the "Seal Head"? The first seed competitor with the ghost seal in the super-duper fun "Seal Slammers"?

t_ch: …我不同意，但你请便。我只是觉得，手账还是该以记录风土人情为主。
t_en: ...I'm against including this photo, but suit yourself. I just think that a travel journal should mainly focus on documenting local customs and culture.

t_ch: 奥赫玛、悬锋城、树庭…这几张都不错。不得不说，你的技术快赶上三月了。
t_en: Okhema, Castrum Kremnos, the Grove... these shots are all pretty great. I have to say, your skills are almost on par with March's now.

t_ch: 不愧是我！啊对了，这张如何：{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}永夜之帷，欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，藏在迷雾背后的泰坦…够震撼吧？
t_en: That's how awesome I am! Oh right, how about this one: The {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Veil of Evernight, Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, the Titan lurking behind the mist... Pretty epic, right?

t_ch: 这是真迷雾…还是你手抖导致的重影？
t_en: Is that actual mist... or just motion blur from your shaky hands?

t_ch: 哎呀，当时那场面多紧张，我只能抓拍，有就不错了。
t_en: Hey, that was a super tense moment! I only had the chance to take a quick one. We're lucky to have anything at all!
Huh...?

t_ch: 刚才，是不是有什么声音？
t_en: Did you... hear something?

t_ch: …三月七？
t_en: ...March 7th?

t_ch: 兴许是照片捕捉到了一丝「岁月」的神力，给你重放了回忆中的幻听。
t_en: Perhaps the photo captured a trace of Time's divine power, which replayed echoes from your memories.

t_ch: 呃…行吧，那咱们继续……
t_en: Uh... alright then. Let's keep going...

t_ch: 要是三月在，肯定能提供不少好点子。
t_en: If March were here, she'd definitely have plenty of great ideas.
Hmm...

t_ch: 他们就这么你一言我一语，商量了好几个小时。
t_en: They went back and forth like that, discussing for hours.

t_ch: 就像在争玩什么游戏，怎么背着帕姆从餐车偷夜宵，谁来洗姬子姐姐的咖啡杯——就像列车上的每一个夜晚。
t_en: It was like they were arguing about which game to play, how to sneak midnight snacks from the dining car without Pom-Pom noticing, or who was gonna wash Miss Himeko's coffee cup, just like every other night on the Express.

t_ch: 他们一直都在我身边。没人知道我被遗忘的过去，也没人会心有芥蒂。因为……
t_en: They've always been by my side. No one knows about my forgotten past, but no one holds it against me. That's because...

t_ch: 我们无法回到过去，做出更好的选择。
t_en: We can't go back to the past and make better choices.

t_ch: 但至少，我们会在未来做得更好。
t_en: But at least we can do better in the future.

t_ch: 你说，对吧？
t_en: Isn't that right?

t_ch: 我没有忘记，你第一次换上这身衣服，看向镜子的那天。
t_en: I still remember the day when you first put on these clothes and looked in the mirror.

t_ch: 你的眼睛很清澈。当一切过去，我希望镜子映出的，依旧是那双眼眸。
t_en: Your eyes were so clear. When all this is over, I hope the mirror can still reflect those same eyes.

t_ch: 看吧，你也很天真啊。总是希望镜子映出最美的一面……
t_en: You're pretty naive, too. Always hoping that the mirror will show the most beautiful side...

t_ch: 可是你又不愿相信镜中的自己，如果总是想要替我扛下所有……那咱可真要变成花瓶，永远等不来主场啦？
t_en: But you don't even trust the you reflected in the mirror, and if you keep trying to shoulder everything for me... then I'll actually end up as a wallflower, waiting forever for my turn!

t_ch: 是啊，我完全能理解，三月七。
t_en: Yes. I get it, March 7th.

t_ch: 我只拥有「你」的记忆，而你…一直是「我」想被世界看见的样子。
t_en: I only have "your" memories, and you... have always been the "me" that I wanted the world to see.

t_ch: 能从你口中听见这句话，我已经心满意足了呀。
t_en: Just hearing those words from you makes me feel super satisfied.

t_ch: 动之以情的部分，我做到了。至于晓之以理……
t_en: Well, I've appealed to your emotions. As for reasoning with logic...

t_ch: 就麻烦昔涟姑娘啦？
t_en: Could you help us out here, Cyrene?

t_ch: 我在呢。终于轮到人家了呀？
t_en: I'm here~ Finally my turn to shine, isn't it?

t_ch: 长夜月小姐，你的目光一直紧盯着自己的目标，恐怕都没有意识到……
t_en: Miss Evernight, you've been so fixated on your target that you probably haven't even realized...

t_ch: 这一世，翁法罗斯出现了一个巨大的变数。
t_en: That a massive variable has emerged in Amphoreus in this cycle.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯濒临毁灭，已容不下无意义的争辩。
t_en: Amphoreus is about to be destroyed. There's no time left for pointless debates.
